info.title: Storage Management API
info.description: REST API for storage management system - consumed by iOS mobile app

pending.description: Whether account has a pending deletion

type.description: Content type: file, image, or video

parentId.description: Parent item ID (null to remove parent)

previewUrl.description: Public preview URL for the item

images.description: Signed images with IDs and URLs

previewUrl.description: Public preview URL for the item

images.description: Signed images with IDs and URLs

totalContents.description: Total number of content attachments for this item

positions.description: Positions to create with the item

quantity.description: Quantity change (positive for additions, negative for removals)

note.description: Optional note for this stock change

parentId.description: Filter by parent ID (use 'null' for root items)

positions.description: Positions to create with the item

url.description: Full API URL to the resource

item_id.description: ID of the item to associate content with

ContentPreviewUploadRequestSchema.description: Content preview upload request with item ID and content items

ContentPreviewUploadResponseSchema.description: Array of presigned upload URLs for content previews

filename.description: Name of the file to upload

publicUrl.description: Public URL where the file will be accessible after upload

expiresAt.description: Expiration timestamp of the presigned URL

categoryId.description: Filter by category ID (use get_categories first to find the ID)

locationId.description: Filter by location ID (use get_locations first to find the ID)

authorId.description: Filter by author ID (use get_authors first to find the ID)

categoryId.description: Filter by category ID (use get_categories first to find the ID)

locationId.description: Filter by location ID (use get_locations first to find the ID)

authorId.description: Filter by author ID (use get_authors first to find the ID)

hasNextPage.description: Whether more items exist after current page

hasPrevPage.description: Whether items exist before current page

schema.description: JSON Schema for the content type

url.description: Full API URL to the resource

file_path.description: S3 file path/key of the original file

video_length.description: Video length in seconds (required for video type)

ContentPreviewUploadItemsSchema.description: Array of content items to generate preview upload URLs for

id.description: File record ID for the preview

imageUrl.description: Presigned PUT URL for preview image upload

videoUrl.description: Presigned PUT URL for preview video upload (only for video type)

get.description: Check if there is a pending account deletion request

post.description: Request account deletion. Account will be deleted after 24 hours. Can be cancelled during the grace period.

delete.description: Cancel a pending account deletion request during the grace period

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of authors
Retrieve a single author by its ID
Retrieve a paginated list of categories
Retrieve a single category by its ID
Retrieve a single content attachment by its ID

delete.description: Delete a content attachment by ID

get.description: Returns paginated content attachments (files, images, videos) for an item with optional search

post.description: Create a new content attachment for an item

get.description: Returns predefined JSON schemas for content types (file, image, video). Used by iOS app to render dynamic forms.
Returns overview statistics including item counts, recent items, and entity totals
Returns the OpenAPI 3.0 specification for the Storage Management API
Retrieve a paginated list of items with optional filters. Supports cursor-based pagination.

parameters.name: parentId

schema.description: Filter by parent ID (use 'null' for root items)

parameters.description: Filter by parent ID (use 'null' for root items)

get.description: Retrieve detailed item information including children, contents, and positions. Public items can be accessed without authentication.

put.description: Set or remove the parent of an item for hierarchical organization

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of locations

post.description: Create a new location with coordinates

get.description: Retrieve a single location by its ID
Retrieve a single position by its ID
Returns all position data entries for an item
Retrieve a paginated list of custom position schemas

post.description: Create a new custom position schema with JSON Schema definition

get.description: Retrieve a single position schema by its ID

delete.description: Delete a position schema by ID

post.summary: Scan QR code and resolve to item URL
post.description: Scan a QR code content and resolve it to an item API URL. Supports preview URL format (preview/item/:id and preview/item?id=) and raw QR codes stored in items.

delete.description: Delete a stock history entry by ID

get.description: Returns all stock history entries for an item, ordered by most recent first

post.description: Create a new stock history entry for an item

post.summary: Generate presigned upload URLs for content previews
post.description: Generate presigned PUT URLs for uploading content preview files. For video type, returns both image thumbnail and video preview URLs. For image type, returns only image preview URL.
Generate a presigned URL for direct file upload to S3. Returns upload URL, file ID, and expiration time.

post.summary: QStash callback to execute account deletion
post.description: This endpoint is called by QStash after the 24-hour grace period.

get.description: Returns all whitelisted emails for a private item (owner only)

post.description: Add an email address to the whitelist for accessing a private item

delete.description: Remove an email from the whitelist
